title: carex × doroyuensis
intro: Carex × doroyuensis is a hybrid plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae), resulting from the cross between Carex dorsata and Carex yoshimurae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been utilized in traditional medicine for various purposes. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and supporting the immune system. Carex × doroyuensis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
